message:
test: wave 14 – 53 new data-type tests across 4 modules

grpc/client.rs: 10 new (ChannelConfig Debug/Clone/Default/all-values,
  ChannelBuilder Debug/all-setters, Channel Debug/Clone/uri, GrpcClient
  Debug/channel-accessor, MetadataInterceptor Debug/empty)
trace/format.rs: 14 new (GoldenTraceConfig Debug/Clone/Eq/ne,
  GoldenTraceOracleSummary Debug/Clone/Eq/empty, GoldenTraceDiff
  Default/Debug/Display/Error, GoldenTraceMismatch Display all 6 variants/
  Debug/Config, schema_version constant, first_prefix_mismatch identical/
  different-lengths)
transport/mock.rs: 12 new (SimTransportConfig Default/Debug/Clone/reliable/
  lossy/with_latency/deterministic, SimLink Debug/Clone, SimNetwork
  fully_connected Debug/link-count, ring link-count/zero-nodes, partition-
  and-heal, transport missing-link)
messaging/nats.rs: 17 new (NatsError Display all 8 variants/Debug/source-io/
  source-none/From, NatsConfig Debug/Clone/from_url with-creds/with-token/
  host-only/invalid-scheme, Message Debug/Clone/no-reply, ServerInfo
  Default/Debug/Clone/parse-full/parse-empty)

Session cumulative: 367 new tests committed (waves 9-14).
